summary: Frontend-only verification of new PriorResetBanner ('Assume prior day ended with a full 10-hour OFF reset — driver's clocks are fresh at 00:00 of this log.') across Split Sleeper Trainer. All 7 review points pass: SL1-SL4 Learn cards each render exactly 1 banner above ELD grid; SL5 multi-day renders 0 banners; SL1-SL4 'Show more examples' extras each render 2 banners (one per single-day extra); Practice SP1-SP4 each render 1 banner. Banner text, colors (#EFF6FF bg, #BFDBFE border), DOM position (above grid), and iteration_28 CVSA shift markers all verified without regression.
critical_code_review_comments: SplitSleeperPage.js is 643 lines — still within limits but growing; consider extracting PriorResetBanner + other small sub-components into /components/hos/ for reuse and maintainability.
PriorResetBanner is pure/presentational with no props — fine, but if future scenarios need customized copy (e.g. 'assume prior 34-hour restart'), parameterize via a prop now to avoid duplication.

hosScenarios.js is ~1300 lines (called out in iteration_28) — still not split; priorReset flag was added to ~14 scenarios this iteration, making the file denser. Splitting by LEARN/PRACTICE/CONTENT recommended.

Accessibility: Moon icon has no aria-label; the

text conveys meaning so icon is decorative — consider adding aria-hidden='true' to the Moon for clarity to screen readers.
test_credentials: Badge 042 / PIN 1234 (login selectors: [data-testid="badge-input"], [data-testid="badge-continue-btn"], [data-testid="pin-input"] auto-submits on Enter).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PriorResetBanner selector: [data-testid="prior-reset-banner"]. Rendered inside LearnCard, LearnExtra, and PracticeTab scenario section only when scenario.priorReset === true. SL5 and its extras (SL5-b, SL5-c) intentionally omit priorReset. Extras container selector: [data-testid="learn-extras-{SL_ID}"], expand button: button:has-text('more examples'). Practice next scenario: [data-testid="scenario-next"] or text='Next scenario'.
verified_checkpoints: SL1 learn-card renders exactly 1 prior-reset-banner with correct text & #EFF6FF/#BFDBFE palette
Banner DOM position verified above ELD SVG for SL1 (bannerTop < svgTop)
SL1-SL4 'Show more examples' extras each contain 2 banners (one per single-day extra)
Practice SP1, SP2, SP3, SP4 each render exactly 1 banner (1 visible at a time)
Iteration_28 CVSA shift markers still render: SL1 13:00/17:00, SL2 08:00/13:00 confirmed in card text
No JS console errors; clean layout with no overlap between banner and grid
